Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Weijun Huang, Defendant appearing In Propria Persona
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held on Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. Ruling after Hearing: The Court finds that $1,446.67 are insurance proceeds and not exempted shall be released to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. The court finds that $675.00 are earnings. 75% of earnings are returned to judgment debtor, 25% shall be released to judgment creditor for payment on judgment. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-15-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the reocord.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Resurgence Financial, LLC.
Defendant: Weijun Huang aka Weijun J. Huang, present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff will accept a $5,000.00 for full settlement amount from the Defendant, payments will be made a the rate of $50.00 on the 15th and 30th of each month, starting on Nov. 30, 2006. If Defendant failed, upon 5 days notice to the Defendantent, Plaintiff in entitled to a Judgment of $6,200.00 less any credit, plus 10% interest from date of default, or dismissal of the action when fully paid.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 Calendar on Feb. 15, 2011, at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212 for Dismissal.
